name: Brutus
description: GPU-based powder diffraction indexing (exhaustive search).

name: IndexMan
description: Generate HKL for any space group; manually index patterns.

name: Powder 5
description: LeBail or Pawley extraction for X-ray/neutron patterns.

name: Combs
description: Powder diffraction lattice indexing (combinatorial hkl search).

name: powder4_source
description: Legacy utility for converting, indexing, simulating, and analyzing powder data.

name: Misfit-fit
description: Lattice parameter fit (LeBail) for modulated structures.

name: Harko
description: Analyze Harker planes in Patterson maps.

name: Miller Planes
description: Visualize directions or crystallographic planes.

name: Stereographic
description: Visualize point symmetry operations with stereographic projections.

name: 2D Space groups
description: Symmetry and positions in the 2D space groups.

name: 2D patterns generator
description: Generates images based on the 17 space groups symmetry.

name: Symmetry
description: Motifs and symmetry operations for the 32 point groups.

name: 3D Symmetry
description: Analyzes symmetry operations and translations in 3D.

name: Reciprocal Space Viewer
description: Visualizes reciprocal lattice, distances, and Brillouin zones.

name: Ewald Sphere Viewer
description: Visualizes the Ewald sphere construction in reciprocal space.

name: Laue Diffraction
description: Simulator for single-crystal Laue diffraction.

name: Laue 2
description: Simulate Laue patterns and orient single crystals (experimental).

name: PDF Explorer
description: Interactive Pair Distribution Function g(d) for 2D arrangements.

name: Patterson function
description: Demonstrates structure, diffraction pattern, and Patterson function.

name: Single Crystal Diffraction
description: Advanced simulator for 4-circle experiments.

name: Simple Cubic Powder XRD
description: Simulate the simple cubic powder X-ray diffraction.

name: 2D diffraction
description: Diffraction patterns of 2D structures.

name: Diffraction Methods
description: Visualizes different experimental diffraction methods.

name: Kiessig Fringes
description: X-ray Reflectivity for a single film on a substrate.

name: X-ray reflectivity
description: Multi-layers X-ray Reflectivity (XRR) calculator.

name: Seebeck Calculator
description: Calculates absolute Seebeck coefficient for thermoelectric legs.

name: Online Seebeck Calculator
description: Calculates thermoelectric power for common thermocouples.

name: 3-omega 2D fit
description: Calculates thermal properties from 3-omega experiments (2D model).

name: 3-omega Linear fit
description: Calculates thermal conductivity via linear fitting of 3rd harmonic.

name: Simulate 3-omega
description: Simulates harmonic signals for thermal conductivity experiments.

name: Versatile
description: Legacy program for calculating non-isothermal kinetic parameters.

name: HT-Halbach
description: System for measuring Hall effect at high temperature (DC and AC).

name: Calculate Hall signal
description: Calculates Hall signals for various conditions.

name: Halbach array simulator
description: Simulates the magnetic field in some Halbach arrays built with discrete cyclindrical components.

name: Mandhala
description: This is an exploration of the magnetic field (equivelent to k=2 in a Halbach setup) that can be obtained with some exotic distributions of dipoles (fullerene, Lebedev and Fibonacci).

name: Van der Pauw Calculator
description: Calculates resistivity from van der Pauw method measurements.

name: Programmable Resistor
description: Design and simulate a programmable resistor for automated testing.

name: Fick's Laws
description: Simulation of 1D diffusion processes and concentration profiles.

name: Onsager's diffusion model
description: Simulation of 1D multi-component diffusion processes, fluxes and concentration profiles with the Onsager's model.

name: ThermoMigrate
description: Explore thermal migration in thermocouple legs.

name: Yappari
description: Impedance spectroscopy analysis (non-linear fitting, DRT, Z-Hit).

name: Sauerbrey
description: Estimate deposition rates with QCM.

name: Gap
description: Estimate bandgap with simple linearisation of Tauc plots.

name: X-ray Emission Spectra
description: Generates and displays X-ray emission spectra.

name: X-ray Absorption & Filters
description: Simulates the effect of a filter on an X-ray spectrum.

name: X-ray Monochromators
description: Effect of a single crystal monochromator on an X-ray spectrum.

name: EXAFS simulations
description: Simple EXAFS simulations for single paths on 2D structures.

name: Atomic Energy Levels
description: Schematically displays atomic energy levels (K, L, M).

name: High Pressure Calculator
description: Calculates pressure from ruby fluorescence line shift.

name: 2D Radon Transform
description: Computes and displays the 2D Radon Transform (Sinogram).

name: Color Radon Transform
description: Explorer for the 2D Radon Transform on color images.

name: 3D Radon Transform
description: A 3D explorer for computed tomography.

name: 2D Hough Transform
description: An interactive explorer for line detection in images.

name: Simple camera
description: Camera feed with flip, markers and scale.

name: SPS Control
description: Interactive web app for a Spark Plasma Sintering system.

name: PVD Control
description: Interface for a Physical Vapor Deposition system.

name: CVD Control
description: Web application for a Chemical Vapor Deposition system.

name: General Purpose DOE Tool
description: Design and analyze experiments (Factorial, RSM, Taguchi).

name: MultiPass planner
description: This program will design an experiment plan and prepare a JSON file with the settings selected by the user (Factorial, RSM, Taguchi). Used for an in house MultiPass program.

name: Optimum calculations
description: Calculate optimum experimental parameters by using the plan obtained from Multipass and experimental results.

name: Keithley622x Control
description: Control a Keithley 6221 AC/DC current source.

name: PPMS Control
description: VIs for controlling a Quantum Design PPMS via GPIB.

name: QR10x LabVIEW Drivers
description: Drivers for controlling QR-10x programmable resistors.

name: MFLI_SM
description: State Machine for Zurich Instruments MFLI lock-in amplifier.

name: 2D Fourier Transform
description: Visualizes the 2D Fourier Transform of various sources.

name: Fourier series
description: Generate simple waves with Fourier.

name: Convolutions of functions
description: Demonstrates simple 1D and 2D convolution functions.

name: Lock-in Amplifier
description: Simulate how a lock-in amplifier works.

name: WaveXplorer
description: Visualizing fundamental concepts of waves.

name: Light Interference
description: A simple visualizing tool for interference of light.

name: Matrix
description: Simple matrix operations.

name: Trig_circle
description: Trigonometric circle visialization.

name: Prime numbers
description: Visualize Ulam spiral.

name: Eratosthene sieve
description: Find prime numbers.

name: Perfect Numbers
description: Find perfect positive integers.

name: Buffon approximation
description: Estimate pi with needles.

name: Markov chains
description: About dependent probabilities.

name: Monte Carlo
description: More probabilities.

name: Pascal Triangles
description: Binomial expansions and combinatorics.

name: Fractals explorer
description: Visualize some fractals.

name: Fibonacci spiral
description: A visual demonstration of Fibonacci numbers.

name: Fibonacci (LabVIEW)
description: Compute and visualize the Fibonacci sequence.

name: Collatz Conjecture
description: Interactive visualization of the Collatz conjecture.

name: Conway's Game of Life
description: A simulation of Conway's Game of Life.

name: Play with graphs
description: Interactive web app looking for paths in graph theory.

name: Kaprekar's Constant
description: Interactive web app illustrating Kaprekar's constant.

name: FG_indicators
description: A Functional Global for reading and setting booleans. This avoids race conditions, contrary to Globals.

name: TDMS
description: A simple Functional Global utility to save data to TDMS files; Labview 2023

name: FG_save
description: A Functional Global utility to save data to ASCII files.

name: Report Generator
description: Generate reports from a Tab control in the user interface.

name: Splash
description: Animated GIF splash window for LabVIEW programs.

name: message_box
description: A utility for creating custom message boxes in LabVIEW.

name: Graph with Y error bars
description: A LabVIEW utility for creating XY graphs with Y error bars.

name: Md 2 pdf
description: Convert a md file into pdf.

name: TDMS reader
description: Read and Export data from TDMS files.

name: CSV Scrapper
description: Visualize/convert CSV from Zurich Instruments lock-ins.

name: Optical encoder
description: Simulate optical encoders.

name: MP4 to Gif
description: Convert MP4 to animated Gif. Not so useful, sometimes I use this for making animated Splash vi's in Labview.

name: Motricity
description: Simple response time tester.

name: Local meteo
description: Local weather forecast.

name: Radio is not dead
description: Listen to some radios.

name: Calendar
description: Print a simple calendar.

name: NASA APOD
description: Displays NASA's Astronomy Picture of the Day.

name: Snake Game
description: A classic snake game.
